title: Frcctre 24 Pack Glass Votive Candle Holders, Clear Tealight Candle Holder Bulk Floating Candles Holder for Wedding Birthday Holiday Home Table Decoration
features: Glass Tealight Candle Holders: Package includes 24 pcs glass votive candle holders. Dimension: The opening size 2" D, bottom size 1.8"D, height 2.6". Candle holders can be used with regular votive candles, tea light candle, and flameless LED tea waxes less than 1.5" in diameter. (Note: Candles not included)

Premium Material: Our tealight candle holders set use high-quality and durable lead-free glass, which is smooth, transparent and bubble-free. After lighting glass candle, the clear glass will enhance the natural warm light of votive candles, makes the light more even and elegant, providing excellent visual enjoyment

Durable Quality: Bulk of 24 pcs clear tea light candle holders comes safely packaged in individual compartments inside a protective box. Thick vitreous wall and aggravating base prevent candle combustion to cause tea light holders to burst, making candle holder sturdy and durable enough

Exquisite Decoration: Candle holders will creating dreamy, romantic, warm and beautiful scenes. Our tealight candle holder is perfect as a decorative table centerpiece for weddings, surprise parties, dinners and various themed events

Best DIY Gift Choice: Our glass candle holders works great for DIY tealight candle. You can apply your favorite colors, patterns or beautiful stickers to the candle holder set to make your own unique style tealights. Whether it is used as a gift or for family use, it is your ideal choice
